title: not recognizing constant function as constant
body:
git master version of Verilator

The affected function does not have any inputs and is not using outside signals. It generates a table using parameters and loop variables. The loop variables are probably the ones being seen as non constant.

The reported error for the [linked source code](https://github.com/jeras/synthesis-optimizations/blob/4221e82cace740b2b7afe8059665c5952e4308b0/rtl/bin2oht_base.sv) and arguments `--lint-only --timing` is:

```
%Error: ../../rtl/bin2oht_base.sv:40:28: Expecting expression to be constant, but can't determine constant for FUNCREF 'tbl_f'
                                       : ... note: In instance 'bin2oht_tb.imp[0].dut..exact.bin2oht.branch.bin2oht_brn'
        ../../rtl/bin2oht_base.sv:34:29: ... Location of non-constant ASSIGN: Select LHS isn't simple variable
        ../../rtl/bin2oht_base.sv:40:28: ... Called from 'tbl_f()' with parameters:
   40 |     localparam tbl_t TBL = tbl_f();
      |                            ^~~~~
%Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s)
```
